data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Priority booking (members book before public)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that members get a 7-day advance booking compared to 3 days for non-members, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate the actual implementation of priority booking. This lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that members can book before the public.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
